    Teams

    Meet the teams competing in the 2026 MBA season.

    Victoria Falls Panthers

    Tadiwanashe Kunaka

    The Vipers are known for their aggressive defense and fast-paced offensive style.

    Chamabondo Primary Arena

    Victoria Falls Suns

    Tapiwa

    A disciplined team with exceptional ball movement and three-point shooting.

    Vic Falls Sports Club

    Hwange Basketbal Club

    David Williams

    Known for their dominant paint presence and rebounding prowess.

    Hwange Main Training Center

    Zol

    Lisa Park

    A young and athletic team that thrives in transition offense.

    Hwange Main Training Center

    Central Lions

    James Brown

    Veteran-led team with championship experience and clutch performers.

    Lions Court
